title: parosela wislizeni var. sessilis
intro: Parosela wislizeni var. sessilis, also known as Sessile Parosela, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as having antioxidant and antiseptic properties, which can help to protect against infections and promote wound healing. Parosela wislizeni var. sessilis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
